Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.4 agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.4.zip --title ''v0.4'' --notes ''## Changes:*)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.6 agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.6.zip --title ''v0.6'' --notes ''## Changes:*)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.7 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.7.zip'' --title ''v0.7'' --notes ''Creature-type-based blood colors with settings dialog. Undead, constructs, aberrations, plants, oozes, celestials/fey, fiends, and dragons each have distinct default colors. Elementals suppress blood effects but keep desaturation. A new GM settings dialog lets colors be customized per type. Adds a Custom creature type path field for unsupported systems. Also: blood pool now takes ~16s to fully spread, fade-out timer starts only after full spread, and pool color darkens over its lifetime.''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.8 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.8.zip'' --title ''v0.8 \(testing\)'' --notes ''Testing release. Adds creature-type-based blood colors with settings dialog, elemental blood suppression, partial type string matching for parenthetical types, and a continuous damage red tint via the TMFX adjustment filter alongside desaturation.''")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release upload v0.8 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.8.zip'' --clobber")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.9 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.9.zip'' --title ''v0.9'' --notes ''Damage tint now derives from the creature blood color rather than hardcoded red. The dominant color channel is boosted to 1.8 at 0 HP while absent channels fall to 0.3, giving each creature type a visually distinct tint. Elementals receive desaturation only with no tint applied.''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.1 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.1.zip'' --title ''v1.1'' --notes ''Adds blood path trails: a new Enable Blood Path Trails setting places randomised drips and directional smears in each grid square a bloodied token crosses during movement. Smears are oriented to the travel direction and the system respects ruler waypoints for multi-segment paths. Marks share the existing trail lifetime and spacing settings. Also changes the undead default blood color to medium gray.''")
